creator: malyn@strangeGizmo.com
text:
It appears that the packing list I submitted with my port was incorrect.
I am attaching the context diff for the new .shar file.  I apologize for
the inconvenience.

Michael Alyn Miller


*** AlephOne.shar.orig  Wed Feb 28 14:02:21 2001
--- AlephOne.shar       Wed Feb 28 14:01:51 2001
***************
*** 117,123 ****
  Xshare/AlephOne/MML/Text_Strings.mml
  Xshare/AlephOne/MML/Transparent_Liquids.mml
  Xshare/AlephOne/MML/Transparent_Sprites.mml
- Xshare/AlephOne/Map
  Xshare/AlephOne/Themes/Default/button_c.bmp
  Xshare/AlephOne/Themes/Default/button_l.bmp
  Xshare/AlephOne/Themes/Default/button_r.bmp
--- 117,122 ----
